concept: Retro-style trophy with 'Most Mediocre Camper' engraved
title: Most Mediocre Camper Funny Camping Award T-Shirt
description:
Celebrate your outdoor adventures with a little self-deprecating humor! Whether you’re the one who always forgets the tent poles or the champion of overcooked marshmallows, this design proudly honors your title as the 'Most Mediocre Camper.' Embrace the chaos of camping, because you’re not here for perfection — you’re here for the memories (and maybe some s’mores). 

Perfect for: 
- Campers who embrace imperfection with a laugh 
- Anyone with a knack for minor camping mishaps 
- Friends or family who jokingly dub you the 'camping expert'

DETAILS: Crisp bold linework features a retro-inspired trophy cup with 'Most Mediocre Camper' engraved on its base. Available in a range of colors to make sure your sense of humor shines bright wherever nature takes you. Made-to-order with love.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
